zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Leybourne於1165年出生在英國英格蘭肯特萊波恩時，他的父親Phillip de Leybourne25歲，母親Amice fitz Gerold11162歲。他於大約1192年與Mrs. Margaret De Leybourne在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1191年登記服兵役。他去世於1199年在英國英格蘭艾可莫特 布勒斯享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leybourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Laybourne
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Leyburn in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from Old English hlēg ‘shelter’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Leybourne was born in 1165, in Leybourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Phillip de Leybourne, was 25 and his mother, Amice fitz Gerold, was 11162. He married Mrs. Margaret De Leybourne about 1192, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1191. He died in 1199, in Mount Bures, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Leybourne est né en 1165, à Leybourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Phillip de Leybourne, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Amice fitz Gerold, avait 11162 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Margaret De Leybourne environ 1192, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1191. Il est décédé en 1199, à Mount Bures, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

Er hat um 1192 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Margaret De Leybourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1191 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1199 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Mount Bures, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Leybourneが1165年にイギリスイギリスケントリーボウルンで生まれた時，父Phillip de Leybourneは25歳，母Amice fitz Geroldは11162歳であった。約1192年にイギリスイギリスケントでMrs. Margaret De Leybourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1191年に兵役登録をした。彼は1199年にイギリスイギリスエセックスモウント ブレスで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Leybourne(이)가 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Phillip de Leybourne(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Amice fitz Gerold(은)는 11162세였다. 그는 대략 1192년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Mrs. Margaret De Leybourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1191년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1199년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 모우트 버스에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Mrs. Margaret De Leybourne aproximadamente 1192, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1191. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Leybourne родился в 1165 г. в местности либурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Phillip de Leybourne было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Amice fitz Gerold, 11162. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Margaret De Leybourne около 1192 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1191 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1199 г. в местности маунт буресь, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.
